blueprints.title: Grade 4 Natural Sciences and Technology Baseline Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Samples approved items across all 18 CAPS topics in grade4_natural_sciences_and_technology_en to establish a starting mastery profile.

blueprints.title: Living and non-living things Topic Diagnostic
blueprints.description: Diagnostic covering CAPS 4.NST.1.1 with balanced difficulty and misconception coverage.

blueprints.title: Living and non-living things Short Practice
blueprints.description: Short practice quiz after the standard lesson variant.

blueprints.title: Living and non-living things Recheck
blueprints.description: Targets previously missed misconceptions with on-level and challenging items.

blueprints.title: Living and non-living things Mastery Check
blueprints.description: End-of-topic check emphasising on-level and challenging application items.
